apps.name: Plombus
apps.summary: Offline Latvian plant identification — 99 species, photo galleries, edibility, map.
apps.description: Field guide for Latvian plants: 99 species with 1.3k photos, edibility classes with preparation notes, gallery swipe (Tinder) triage, offline map and a searchable wiki. Fully offline.

history.changelog: Added in-app update notifications.
Edibility in Lietojums tab; UI polish.

apps.name: Aksess
apps.summary: Access-control field inventory — photo+GPS records, 28-manufacturer catalog with programming guides, similar-brand/clone links, map.
apps.description: Inventory installed access-control systems across the city: photo with EXIF GPS, manufacturer/model/features/placement. Catalog of 28 manufacturers and 145 devices with programming guides (default codes, commands, resets) — premium readers, no-brand Chinese keypad clones (Sebury/ATLO/generic) and CIS apartment domofons (Eltis, VIZIT, Cyfral, Metakom, Rainmann). Similar-brand/clone links, a Latvian distributor directory, offline map with colour-coded markers, searchable wiki. Fully offline.

latest.changelog: Catalog expansion: added Farfisa and Commax manufacturers and expanded Rosslare (8→19 devices) — now 30 manufacturers / 201 devices, with programming sequences, default codes, wiring and factory-reset guides per device.

history.changelog: Security hardening: disable cloud backup of inventory data (allowBackup=false).
Fix: add R8/ProGuard keep-rules so the expanded catalog (kotlinx.serialization) is preserved in the optimized release build. Supersedes 0.2.0.

Catalog expanded to 28 manufacturers / 145 devices: added no-brand keypad clones (Sebury/ATLO/generic/YLI) and CIS domofons (Eltis, VIZIT, Cyfral, Metakom, Rainmann) with verified service codes. New similar-brand/clone links, tier badges, and a Latvian distributor & service directory.
Added in-app update notifications.
Initial release: inventory, 20-manufacturer catalog, map, wiki.

apps.name: Azerbaijan Guide
apps.summary: Offline Azerbaijan travel guide — full guide, offline vector map, deep articles for 110 places, birds, plants and dishes.
apps.description: Complete offline travel guide for Azerbaijan: every section as its own page, an offline MapLibre vector map with colour-coded markers, bird and plant galleries, and a deep reading page (article + facts + tips) for every place, species and dish. Also available as a web PWA.

latest.changelog: Security hardening: enable R8 code shrinking/obfuscation + minify web JS; disable cloud backup and cleartext traffic.

history.changelog: Added in-app update notifications.
Initial release: guide, offline map, galleries, reader pages.

apps.name: Barcode Scanner
apps.description: Minimal offline barcode and QR scanner built on CameraX and ZXing with scan history.

history.changelog: Initial release: offline barcode/QR scanner.

apps.name: Namedays LV
apps.summary: Latvian name days calendar with daily reminders.
apps.description: Latvian vārda dienas: searchable calendar, today's names, and daily reminder notifications (Room + WorkManager). Fully offline.

latest.changelog: Fix exact-alarm permission lint (scope SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM to API <=32); retains prior security hardening (allowBackup=false).

history.changelog: Security hardening: disable cloud backup (allowBackup=false).
Added in-app update notifications.
Initial release: Latvian name-days with daily reminders.

apps.name: Cleanup
apps.summary: Storage cleanup + organizer with on-device suggestions for freeing space.
apps.description: Scan your storage, get ranked suggestions (duplicates, leftover installers, screenshot piles, big old videos), organise messy folders into typed subfolders, and review the largest files and apps by size. Safe by design: removals go to a recycle bin first, nothing auto-deletes. Fully offline.

latest.changelog: Security hardening: R8/ProGuard obfuscation now applied in release (keep-rules added); disable cloud backup (allowBackup=false).

history.changelog: Initial release: scan, suggestions, organise, apps, recycle bin.

apps.name: Cloudberry Latvia Markers
apps.summary: Browse and navigate to curated map locations across Latvia.
apps.description: Interactive map app for exploring locations across Latvia. Browse points on an OpenStreetMap view or in a searchable list sorted by distance from you, then tap any marker to see its coordinates and open turn-by-turn directions. Built for finding and reaching cloudberry and other nature/foraging spots.

history.changelog: Reverse-engineering prevention: R8 shrinking + Dart obfuscation. Fixed app name to Cloudberry Latvia Markers.
Initial release: offline marker map of Latvia with search, distance sorting, and tap-to-navigate.

apps.name: WayPay
apps.summary: Import DJI drone .kmz waypoint routes into DJI Fly from your phone — no PC needed.
apps.description: WayPay copies waypoint .kmz files (e.g. routes drawn at waypointmap.com) into DJI Fly's protected app folder using Shizuku, replacing the usual PC+adb workflow with about one tap. Early, experimental personal utility: import happy-path only, requires Shizuku installed and running. Use at your own risk.

history.changelog: Security: enable R8 code shrinking + obfuscation (reverse-engineering prevention) with targeted Shizuku/AIDL keeps.
Initial early-preview: import DJI .kmz waypoint files into DJI Fly via Shizuku (import happy-path only).

apps.name: Gvido's Apps
apps.summary: The marketplace client — browse, install, and update all of Gvido's apps in one place.
apps.description: The phone client for this app store. Browse every app, see which are installed and which have updates, and install or update with one tap. Offline-cached catalog, version history, changelogs, and an in-app diagnostics log. Sideload store — updates are one-tap (Android shows the install prompt).

history.changelog: Reverse-engineering prevention: R8 code shrinking + obfuscation.
Initial release: browse, install and update all apps from one screen; offline catalog cache; in-app diagnostics log.

apps.name: Bombus
apps.summary: Identify and log bumblebee sightings with an offline field guide.
apps.description: Offline bumblebee identification app for field naturalists. A visual ID guide and searchable species guide help you identify bees; register sightings with species, GPS coordinates, confidence, photos and notes into a local on-device database, then browse your saved findings. Fully offline, no account.

history.changelog: Reverse-engineering prevention: R8 shrinking + Dart obfuscation.
Initial release: bumblebee ID guide + log sightings (species, GPS, photos, notes) to an offline database, with a saved-findings list.

apps.name: ASVS Checklist
apps.summary: Offline OWASP ASVS pentest checklist — 345 requirements, L1/L2/L3, tick-off + export.
apps.description: An offline OWASP Application Security Verification Standard (ASVS 5.0.0) checklist for security assessments. Browse all 345 requirements across 17 chapters, filter by assurance level (L1/L2/L3), tick each off as Pass/Fail/N-A/Pending with progress tracking, search the full text, and export your results as JSON or CSV to finish the report on desktop. Fully offline.

history.changelog: Initial release: offline OWASP ASVS 5.0.0 checklist — 345 requirements, L1/L2/L3 filter, Pass/Fail/N-A tick-off, progress, search, JSON/CSV export.

latest.changelog: Reverse-engineering prevention: R8 code shrinking + obfuscation (Room keeps; org.json parsing unaffected).

apps.name: Knots — Climbing & Rappel
apps.summary: Offline climbing & rappel knots, rope techniques, and priced gear loadouts.
apps.description: Learn the essential climbing and rappel knots offline: 18 knots (prusik, figure-8 tie-in, sliding/friction hitches, joining bends, Munter, stoppers) with step-by-step instructions, safety callouts, and illustrated/animated visuals. Plus multi- and single-rope descent techniques, a 10-point rappel safety checklist, and 4 priced gear loadouts sourced from gandrs.lv. Educational reference, not a substitute for hands-on instruction. Fully offline.

latest.changelog: Initial release: 18 climbing/rappel knots with steps, safety callouts and illustrated/animated visuals; 11 rope techniques (multi- & single-rope); 10-point rappel safety checklist; 4 priced gear loadouts (gandrs.lv).

apps.name: Car Security Check
apps.summary: Check a used car's theft/security exposure before buying — offline, source-cited (EU/LV).
apps.description: Before buying a used car, check its security and theft exposure offline. Look up 206 models to see which security issues affect them — keyless relay, RollingPWN rolling-code defeat, CAN-injection theft, OBD key-cloning, weak/absent immobilisers, infotainment vulns — each confidence-labelled and source-cited, with detection methods (kerbside / inside / test-drive / OBD / radio-scan), remediations flagged genuine-fix vs mitigation-only, immobiliser key-system strength, and risky accessories with EU/Latvia legal status. Research-grade reference, not professional advice; absence of a listing is not proof a car is safe. Fully offline.

latest.changelog: Initial release: offline used-car security checker — 206 models, 22 source-cited security issues with detection + remediation, 7 immobiliser key systems, risky accessories (EU/LV legal status).

apps.name: aWaWa
apps.summary: Offline gear inventory + mission/trip planner with packing checklists & reminders.
apps.description: Organize your gear and plan trips offline. Catalogue inventory items (photos, quantity, notes, custom categories), build missions with a packing checklist + per-item to-dos, track mission progress (Planned → Active → Completed) with countdowns and reminders, duplicate missions as templates, and back up/restore everything as JSON. A dashboard shows your gear and active missions at a glance. Fully offline.

latest.changelog: Major refresh: full CRUD, dashboard, mission lifecycle + progress, custom categories, duplicate missions, JSON backup/restore, formatted dates + countdowns, polished Material 3 UI.

apps.name: Jasmīns LV (Wild Jasmine)
apps.summary: Find wild 'jasmine' (mock orange) in Latvia — map of spots, field guide & wiki.
apps.description: A map + field guide for finding wild 'jasmine' in Latvia — which is really mock orange (Philadelphus coronarius / neīstais jasmīns), an old-manor-park shrub that smells like jasmine. Browse 37 mapped spots (iNaturalist/GBIF records + historic manor parks) across all regions, with an identification guide, look-alikes, the June bloom window, the find-it indicators (the lilac + mock-orange pairing marks a vanished homestead), and a searchable wiki. Spot data, guide and coordinates are offline; the map tiles need network. Grown for scent, not food — see the safety note.

latest.changelog: Initial release: map of 37 wild mock-orange ('jasmīns') spots in Latvia (iNaturalist/GBIF + manor parks), identification guide, look-alikes, find-it indicators, and a searchable wiki.

apps.name: Akmeņmedības — Latvija
apps.summary: Find amber, fossils, gems & rocks in Latvia — map, illustrated catalog, methods & the law.
apps.description: A field companion for rock, gem, fossil and AMBER hunting in Latvia. A map of 25 spots (Kurzeme amber beaches, Devonian fossil cliffs, geological monuments, museums) with navigation; an illustrated CATALOG of 23 finds — Baltic amber, armoured Devonian fish, brachiopods, corals, crinoids, trilobites, gypsum/selenite, calcite, pyrite, quartz, flint, agate, garnet, rapakivi granite, belemnites and more — each with a photo, ID tips, where to look and rarity; HOW-TO-HUNT methods including sand sifting + the brine float test, storm timing and the traditional amber-netting; and a LAW & RULES section (what's allowed and where, with statute citations). Includes the white-phosphorus safety warning. Spot data, catalog and guide are fully offline; the map tiles need network.

history.changelog: Initial release: amber/rock/fossil hunting in Latvia — map of 25 spots, illustrated 23-item catalog (with photos), 10 hunting methods incl. sand sifting + brine test, full Law & Rules section, and the phosphorus safety warning.

latest.changelog: Major content update: integrated deep field research — 49 collecting spots, 15 verified map sites/zones, 29 rock & mineral finds, 17 methods, plus corrected Latvia/Estonia metal-detector rules and legal collecting zones.

apps.name: Sēnes — Latvija
apps.summary: Offline mushroom foraging field guide for Latvia — edible catalog with photos, deadly look-alikes, season & safety.
apps.description: A safety-forward offline guide to foraging mushrooms in Latvia. An illustrated CATALOG of 28 edible species (porcini, chanterelles, boletes, milkcaps, russulas, morels, puffballs and more) with photos, identification features, season, habitat and preparation. A DEADLY & TOXIC section with 16 poisonous species (death cap, destroying angel, funeral bell, deadly webcap, false morel…) and 7 toxic look-alike pairs, built around the delayed-onset warning and the rule: never eat a white-gilled, white-spored mushroom with a sac at the base. A season calendar, habitat guide, the golden safety rules (no folk test works), Latvian foraging law, and a one-tap EMERGENCY screen with the poison centre and ambulance numbers. Fully offline. NOT a substitute for expert identification — when in doubt, throw it out.

latest.changelog: Initial release: offline Latvia mushroom guide — 28 edibles (with photos), 16 poisonous species + 7 toxic look-alike pairs, season calendar, habitat, safety rules, foraging law, and a one-tap emergency/poison-centre screen.

apps.name: SS Vērotājs
apps.summary: Monitor ss.com classifieds by keyword & price — background alerts when a match appears. With 20 security-gear preset filters.
apps.description: Watch the Latvian classifieds site ss.com for exactly what you want. Create monitors over any of 813 categories with keyword include/exclude (ANY/ALL), price range and date filters; the app polls the RSS feeds in the background and fires a notification the moment a new listing matches. Includes 20 ready-made SECURITY-GEAR preset filters — SDR/RF, Flipper & BadUSB, RFID/NFC & access, hardware-hacking bench tools, SBCs/MCUs, WiFi & network, lock-picking, practice phones, IoT/camera RE targets, homelab compute, automotive diagnostics, smartcards, security books, PC-component upgrades (GPU/CPU/RAM/storage/expansion cards), wardriving WiFi adapters and OpenWrt/Pineapple-flashable routers. Unified alerts feed with price chips and one-tap open. NOTE: this app fetches ss.com over the network (online).

latest.changelog: Initial release: monitor ss.com classifieds by keyword/price across 813 categories with background notifications, plus 20 security-gear preset filters (SDR, Flipper, RFID, hardware-hacking, wardriving adapters, Pineapple routers, PC-component upgrades, and more).

apps.name: Rotas
apps.summary: Bilingual (EN/LV) offline jewelry-making reference - metals, gemstones with photos, techniques & charts.
apps.description: A complete offline reference for jewelry-making, fully bilingual (English + Latvian, with a language toggle). 27 METALS with melting points, density, hardness, pros/cons and hypoallergenic/nickel warnings, plus the karat-fineness reference. 40 GEMSTONES with photos, Mohs hardness, colours, birthstones, care, and 'too soft for rings' / 'never ultrasonic' warnings. 22 TECHNIQUES (casting, soldering, granulation, filigree...) plus stone settings, findings, gem cuts and tools. 13 REFERENCE CHARTS - ring sizes, wire gauge, Mohs scale, birthstones & anniversaries, hallmarks, solder temperatures, care & cleaning, gem treatments, real-vs-fake tests, safety, chain types, length guides and metal scrap-value. A 59-term EN-LV glossary. Every metal and gemstone has a photo and both English and Latvian names. Fully offline.

latest.changelog: Initial release: bilingual EN/LV jewelry reference - 27 metals (melting points, pros/cons, hypoallergenic), 40 gemstones with photos, 22 techniques + settings/findings/cuts/tools, 13 reference charts, and a 59-term glossary. Fully offline.
